SONG_NO_NAME: Avast! I didn't catch the name o' that sea shanty.
SONG_NOTFOUND_BY_NAME: I've scoured the seven seas, but found no song called %song_name%.
SONG_NOTFOUND_BY_NAME_AND_ARTIST: Me compass can't find %song_name% by the landlubber %artist_name%.
SONG_NOTFOUND_SUGGEST: I found no track called %song_name% by %artist_name%. Perhaps ye meant %suggestion_name% by %suggestion_artist%?
SONG_QUEUED_BY_ARTIST: Stowed %song_name% by %artist_name% in the cargo hold.
ALBUM_NO_NAME: Me ears be full o' salt! I didn't catch the name o' that collection.
ALBUM_NOTFOUND_BY_NAME: I've no map that leads to an album called %album_name%.
ALBUM_NOTFOUND_SUGGEST: Found no album called %album_name% by %artist_name%. Did ye mean %suggestion_name% by %suggestion_artist%?
ALBUM_NOTFOUND_BY_NAME_AND_ARTIST: I didn't find nary an album called %album_name% by %artist_name%.
ALBUM_NO_MUSIC: That chest be empty! No music found in the album %album_name%.
ALBUM_SHUFFLE: Tossin' the album %album_name% to the winds on %skill_name%!
ALBUM_QUEUED: Added the %album_name% treasure to the queue.
ARTIST_NO_NAME: Which bard be ye speakin' of? I didn't catch the name.
ARTIST_NOTFOUND_BY_NAME: I've never heard tell of a musician called %artist_name%.
ARTIST_NO_MUSIC: That pirate %artist_name% has no tunes to share.
ARTIST_QUEUED: Added %count% shanties by %artist_name% to the hold.
GENRE_NO_NAME: I didn't catch the style o' music, matey.
GENRE_NOTFOUND_BY_NAME: I've never heard a sound called %genre_name% in all me travels.
GENRE_NO_MUSIC: No songs o' the %genre_name% variety were found.
GENRE_PLAYING_SIMULAR: Playin' %genre_name% and other similar rhythms on %skill_name%!
GENRE_SHUFFLE_SIMULAR: Mixin' up %genre_name% and similar styles on %skill_name%!
GENRE_QUEUED_SIMULAR: Stashed %count% %genre_name% and similar songs in the queue.
PLAYLIST_NO_NAME: I didn't catch the name o' the scroll.
PLAYLIST_NOTFOUND_BY_NAME: I found no list called %playlist_name% in me cabin.
PLAYLIST_NO_MUSIC: There be no music on the %playlist_name% list.
PLAYLIST_QUEUED: Added %count% tunes from %playlist_name% to the queue.
